ProjectInfo.ObjectivesDetails: I joined the Provu team as a front-end developer, where I led the transformation of a legacy Angular app into a modern, high-performance React platform. My mission was to deliver a seamless user experience and set a new standard for code quality and maintainability.
ProjectInfo.Heading: Challenge
Details: At Provu, I took on the challenge of refactoring a large, outdated Angular application into a sleek, modern React app. I was responsible for every step of the migration, from planning and architecture to hands-on coding and testing.

I built a robust design system with Styled Components, making the UI consistent, reusable, and easy to maintain. Using Redux Saga, I managed complex state and asynchronous flows, ensuring the app was fast and reliable.

I implemented strong form validation with Formik and Yup, so users could trust their data was always accurate and secure. Responsive design was a priority—I made sure the app looked and worked great on any device.
Testing was a cornerstone of my process. I wrote comprehensive unit, integration, and snapshot tests with Jest and React Testing Library, catching bugs early and keeping the codebase rock-solid.
Throughout the project, I focused on performance, maintainability, and a great user experience. Refactoring wasn’t just about new tech—it was about making the product better for everyone who used it.
